1.title: CpuUtilized
1.query:
timeseries cpu_utilized = avg(cloud.aws.containerinsights.cpu_utilized),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device)
| sort arrayAvg(cpu_utilized) desc
| limit 20

2.title: CpuUtilized (by ServiceName)
2.query:
timeseries cpu_utilized_by_service_name = avg(cloud.aws.containerinsights.cpu_utilized_by_service_name),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device)
| sort arrayAvg(cpu_utilized_by_service_name) desc
| limit 20
